GLEAM scoring method comparison

Source: vignettes/GLEAM_scoring_method_comparison.Rmd
GLEAM_scoring_method_comparison.Rmd
ifnb_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
seu <- readRDS(ifnb_path)
expr_ifnb <- Seurat::GetAssayData(seu, assay = Seurat::DefaultAssay(seu), slot = "counts")
meta_ifnb <- seu@meta.data

m1 <- score_signature(expr = expr_ifnb, meta = meta_ifnb, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE, method = "rank")
m2 <- score_signature(expr = expr_ifnb, meta = meta_ifnb, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE, method = "auc")
m3 <- score_signature(expr = expr_ifnb, meta = meta_ifnb, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE, method = "zmean")

cmp <- compare_scoring_methods(rank = m1, auc = m2, zmean = m3)
head(cmp)

Developed by James Woo.
